item.title: Version 1.1.1
item.description:
ParkShelf 1.1.1

  • Help & Feedback in Settings. Reach us in one click — Settings now has a Help & Feedback section that emails contact@parkshelf.com.
  • Native Liquid Glass, on by default (macOS 26). The shelf uses Apple’s Liquid Glass material out of the box. Prefer the previous look? Switch to Classic any time in Settings → Appearance, or try the more transparent “Clear” variant.
  • Refinements and fixes throughout.
